sections.content: Getting a working export flow is vital for usability.
sections.name: export_is_critical

sections.content: What other CLI elements are required before export is fully useful? We may need schema and view support to come first.
sections.name: open_question

sections.content: Likely prerequisites: schema-authoring commands (field/type), view authoring commands (L1/L2), and a basic render/export path that can consume those definitions end-to-end.
sections.name: initial_hypothesis

sourceRefs.note: Working session note about RFC-001 implementation sequencing
